nodes.name: force-commit hook must overwrite every block using a global step counter

meta.rule: The force-commit hook fires on global abs_step; at fire time it overwrites the still-masked positions across the entire gen region (all blocks) at once, then short-circuits the scheduler loop.
meta.why: A block-local implementation only allows the current/prior block at fire time, but those are already committed, so the write is a no-op and the smoke test produces bit-exact baseline output. Observed in diffusion-llm-step iter1 on 2026-04-15.
meta.when: When inserting an intervention hook into a masked-diffusion LM sampler — if the output matches the baseline, suspect immediately and verify via the touched-positions count.
